query: ALTER TABLE verification_records ADD COLUMN verified_by_station_id INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN verification_date DATETIME NULL, MODIFY status ENUM('pending', 'viewed', 'verified', 'rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
